## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Migration/config update

## Related issues

Link issues (for example: Closes #123).

## Validation

List checks you ran and outcomes.

- [ ] go build ./...
- [ ] Python strategy compile checks
- [ ] Local runtime verification (if applicable)

## Risk and impact

- Affected services/components:
- Backward compatibility concerns:
- Rollback plan:

## Database/config changes

- [ ] No DB/config change
- [ ] DB migration included
- [ ] Seed/config updates required

If required, describe exact migration/seed/config steps.

## Security and secrets

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No new credential exposure paths introduced

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md and CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I added/updated docs where needed
- [ ] I kept the PR focused and scoped
